# Fueled by Faith
## Scripture
"Trust in the Lord, and do good; dwell in the land and befriend faithfulness." – Psalm 37:3
## Reflection
As men, we often face challenges that test our resolve and strength. We may feel overwhelmed by the weight of responsibilities, relationships, and our own personal struggles. But the Bible reminds us that our trust should be in the Lord, not in our own abilities or resources. When we trust in Him, we are fueled by faith to face the battles of life. This faith is not a feeling or a decision, but a choice to rely on God's goodness and sovereignty. As we dwell in the land of faithfulness, we are empowered to do good and live lives that honor Him. So, let us choose to trust in the Lord today and every day, knowing that He will sustain us through all challenges.

## Daily Challenge
Do 25 jumping jacks while declaring your trust in the Lord and His goodness.
